choices.a: Content is automatically approved upon upload

choices.a: Network topology diagrams for authentication servers
choices.b: Rules that map external authentication identities to AAP roles, teams, or organizations
choices.c: Configuration files for LDAP directory structure

choices.a: They are deleted and must be recreated
choices.d: They are downgraded to regular users

questions.text: What is the system-level read-only role in AAP called?
questions.objective: Manage users, teams, and access control

questions.text: What happens when dynamic inventory updates encounter a host limit violation?

choices.a: The update succeeds but logs a warning
choices.d: The inventory is rolled back to its previous state

questions.text: In VM-based deployments, where is automation mesh topology defined?

choices.a: In the automation controller web UI
choices.b: In the AAP installer inventory file

questions.text: Each job template in automation controller can specify which of the following?

choices.a: Which Python virtual environment to use

questions.text: What feature allows end users to provide input values when launching a job template?
What are provisioning callbacks in AAP?

choices.a: Webhook notifications sent after job completion
choices.b: A mechanism for hosts to request configuration without an agent
choices.c: API calls to provision new cloud instances

questions.text: What is the default maximum number of running EDA rulebook activations per node?
What are the three path types for workflow nodes?
What authentication method does EDA controller use to communicate with automation controller?
What does a hop node do in automation mesh?

choices.b: Relays traffic only, without executing jobs

questions.text: In automation mesh, which node initiates the connection?

choices.a: The node that is listed as a peer
choices.b: The node that declares the peer in the inventory file
choices.d: The node with the lower IP address

questions.text: What key mesh inventory variables define node behavior and connectivity?
In operator-based (OpenShift) deployments, how is automation mesh configured?

choices.a: Through the AAP installer inventory file

questions.text: What is the difference between migration and upgrade in AAP?

choices.a: Migration changes the version; upgrade changes the installation type
choices.b: Migration changes the installation type; upgrade changes the platform version
choices.d: Migration is for minor versions; upgrade is for major versions

questions.objective: Manage projects and source control integration

questions.text: What is Configuration as Code (CaC) in AAP 2.6?

choices.a: Writing playbooks to configure managed hosts
choices.b: Managing automation controller settings through declarative configuration files
choices.c: Using Git to store Ansible roles

questions.objective: Manage projects and source control integration

questions.text: In AAP 2.6, what happened to the automation controller REST API naming?

choices.b: It was renamed to the "Automation Execution API"
choices.c: It was merged with the Hub API
choices.d: It was replaced by a GraphQL API

questions.text: What must happen to the EDA 2.4 database when upgrading to AAP 2.6?

choices.b: It must be dropped because migrations are incompatible
choices.c: It must be exported and reimported
choices.d: It requires a schema patch before upgrade

questions.text: What is the supported upgrade path to AAP 2.6?

choices.a: Any previous version can upgrade directly to 2.6

questions.text: What replaced Python virtual environments as the isolation mechanism in AAP 2.x?
What CLI tool is used to build custom execution environment images?
Where are built execution environments stored?

choices.a: On the local filesystem of each controller node
choices.b: In container registries such as private automation hub or registry.redhat.io

questions.text: What is a decision environment in Event-Driven Ansible?

choices.a: A virtual machine running rulebook activations
choices.b: A containerized image used by EDA controller to run rulebook activations
choices.c: A set of environment variables for decision logic
choices.d: A Python virtual environment with decision libraries

questions.text: How do backup and recovery procedures differ in AAP?

choices.a: They are identical across all deployment types
choices.b: They are fundamentally different between operator-based and RPM-based deployments
choices.d: Backup is only available through third-party tools

questions.text: What PostgreSQL versions does AAP 2.6 support for external databases?
What limitation exists when using PostgreSQL 16 or 17 with AAP 2.6?

choices.a: They are not supported at all
choices.b: They require external backup/restore tooling because AAP's built-in tools depend on PG 15
choices.c: They only work with operator-based deployments
choices.d: They require a special license from Red Hat
